salesexecutive_description: Website pe ads bechne ke liye Sales Executive rakho.
developer_description: Developers website banane ke liye technical components banate hain.
designer_description: Designers website ke liye graphical components banate hain.
manager_description: Manager saare employees ko control karta hai aur unhe speed bonus deta hai.
leaddeveloper_description: Lead Developer components milake modules banata hai.
sysadmin_description: SysAdmin server configure karne ke liye components banata hai.
marketer_description: Website ke liye naye users lane ke liye Marketer rakho.
hrmanager_description: Kaam ke ghante control karne ke liye HR Manager rakho.
smallretirementplan_description: Karmchariyon ki retirement savings mein paise daalke unka future pakka karo.
freebeverages_description: Muft drinks dekar employees ka mood badhao.
freegymmembership_description: Employees ke fit rehne ke liye muft gym membership do.
extendedretirementplan_description: Employees ki retirement plan aur behtar karo.
freehealthcare_description: Employees ke doctor ka bill apne upar lo.
fullretirementplan_description: Is plan se employees luxury mein ji sakte hain.
paidtransportation_description: Employees ke aane jaane ka kharcha dekar unki life easy karo.

producttype_description: Website Type: Har website type ke alag users aur income hoti hai.
gettingstarted_enter_name: Shuru karne ke liye apni company ka naam likhao:
restart_to_take_effect: Changes lagane ke liye game restart karo.

tip_multi_place: Tip: Ek saath kai items rakhne ke liye SHIFT dabaaye rakho.
loans_description: Jab paisa ho tab saare karz bina kisi extra charge ke chuka sakte ho.
inventory_empty: Inventory khaali hai. Components banane ke liye developers aur designers use karo.
no_contracts_available: Abhi koi contract nahi hai. Contracts lane ke liye Sales Executive rakho.
cancel_contract_confirm: Sach mein yeh contract radd karna chahte ho? {cancellationfee} cancellation fee deni hogi.
select_empty_workstation: Is employee ke liye khaali workstation chuno.
tip_speed: Speed: Yeh employee kitna tez kaam karta hai doosron ke muqable. 100% average hai.
name: Naam
how_change_working_hours: Kaam ke ghante badlne ke liye HR Manager chahiye.
working_hours_effect: Kaam ke ghante agle din se badlenge.

confirm_module_switch: Pakka is module pe switch karna hai? Components inventory mein wapas jaayenge.
confirm_component_switch: Pakka is component pe switch karna hai aur abhi wala cancel karna hai?
confirm_cancel_component: Pakka yeh kaam band karna hai? Kiya hua kaam waapas nahi milega.
manager_tip: Kaunse employees is manager ke saath kaam karenge? Har employee sirf 1 manager ke saath kaam kar sakta hai.
welcomemail_body:
Hello,

Startup Company mein aapka swagat hai.

Game abhi bhi ban raha hai, isliye tips aur hints kam hain. Aapko khud seekhna hoga.

Shuru karne ke liye, apne investor ki salah suno jo neeche daayein kone mein dikhti hai.

Shubhkamnaaein,
Jonas
welcomemail_subject: Startup Company Mein Aapka Swagat Hai!
employeequit_body: Hello, Mujhe {companyName} mein kaam karke bahut khushi hui. Par ab lagta hai company aur mere goals ek nahi hain. Main apni {employeeTypeName} ki naukri chhod raha/rahi hoon. Aapko shubhkamnaaein, {name}
lowmoneywarning_body:
Pyaare Grahak,

Hamara system bata raha hai ki aapka balance $5,000.00 se neeche hai.

Please dhyan do — $0 se neeche jaane par account band ho sakta hai.

Shukriya,
Nordiwa Banking
contractcancel_body: Kya aap aisa hi business karte ho? Hum Contract #{number} cancel kar rahe hain. Aage se hamara saath mat maango.
loancreated_body:
Hello {companyName},

Aapka {amount} ka karz aapke account mein transfer kar diya gaya hai. Kal se apne aap payments kategi.

Shukriya {provider} use karne ke liye.
loanpaidout_body:
Hello {companyName},

Hamne dekha ki aapne apna bacha hua karz poora chuka diya.

{provider} ke saath kaam karne ka shukriya. Phir milenge!
select_employee_to_place: Is workstation pe kaunsa employee rakhna hai chuno.

Fixed price: Client ne daam tay kiya hai.
Bidding: Aap competitors ke saath sabse kum daam mein bid kar rahe hain.
contract_size_description: Chhote Contracts Mein Kam Kaam Lagta Hai. Bade Contracts Zyaada Paisa Dete Hain.
contract_search_time_description: Jitne zyada filters lagaoge, utna zyada dhoondh ka waqt lagega.
new_contract_awaiting: Ek naya contract aapka jawab maang raha hai...
contract_request_description: Yeh contract aapki acceptance ka intezaar kar raha hai. Dhyan do — decline karne par us company ke liye 30 din ka cooldown hoga.
competing_other_companies: Aap aur companies ke saath compete karoge. Apna price per hour chuno.
confirm_exit_game: Pakka game se baahar jaana chahte ho?
confirm_delete_savegame: Pakka yeh save game delete karna chahte ho? Yeh wapas nahi aayega.
subject: Vishay
warning_leaddev_missing_components: Lead Developer Ko Zaroori Ansh Nahi Hain.
piracymail_body:
Hello,

Mera naam Jonas hai, main Startup Company ka developer hoon.

Mujhe pata chala ki aap bahut der se yeh game khel rahe hain. Mujhe umeed hai aapko maza aa raha hai!

Main aapko personally shukriya kehna chahta hoon ki aapne game khareeda. Independent game developer ke liye survive karna mushkil hota hai, aur aap jaisi amazing log hi isse possible banate hain!

Shukriya!

Jonas

mod_uploaded: Steam pe mod ban gaya! Subscribe karo aur game restart karo.

emailcampaigns_description: Users ke inbox mein sidha jaao. Better conversion rate, par mehenga hai.
different_schedule: Naya schedule raat ke baad se lagega.
steamworks_confirm: Dhyan do: Third-party mods ka istemaal apne risk pe hai.

confirm_send_everyone_home: Pakka sab ko {days} din ke liye ghar bhejna hai?
start_time_machine: Time Machine Shuru Karo
emotion_i_hate_boss: Mujhe apna stupid boss se nafrat hai!
emotion_more_js_frameworks: Aur Javascript frameworks hone chahiye the!
emotion_kwitch: Aaj toh Kwitch pe LIRIK dekhna hai!
emotion_might_quit: Agar boss ne chutti nahi di toh naya kaam dhoondhunga.
emotion_ringedin_frustration: Kaash aur RingedIn connections hote, toh zyada important lagta.
emotion_designer_flat: Yeh design itna flat nahi hai...

emotion_deleted: Kya! Kahan gaya? -rf nahi tha kya?
emotion_more_power: Hamaara code nahi, boss sirf server pe kharcha nahi karna chahta!
emotion_takes_so_long: Samajh nahi aata yeh kaam itna kyun lagta hai.
emotion_demand_workhours: Sirf {7} ghante kaam karna kitna achha lagta hoga....
emotion_demand_fireemployee: Ugh, {value} abhi bhi yahan kaise kaam kar raha hai!!

confirm_buyout: Pakka is investor ko {amount} mein khareedna hai?
new_product_deny: Naya website shuru karne ke liye investor khareedna hoga ya kam se kam 15 milestones pura karne honge.
tip_training: Training se employee ki speed badhao. Max speed hone ke baad upgrade karo.
potential_users_warning: Possible users bhar gaye. Features upgrade karo ya naye jodo.
required_cu_per_user: Har user ke liye zaroori CU
production_no_components: Koi component ya module nahi. Employees tab mein zyada employees chuno.
tip_production: Manager khud kaam assign kar dega jab employees free honge. Sabse kam stock wala pehle banega.
researcher_info: Features aur frameworks research karne ke liye Research Points use karo.
max_level_reached: Sabse Upar Ka Level Aa Gaya
efficiency_tip: Efficiency badhao toh hosting cost kam hogi.
enter_product_name: Website ka naam likhao (Friendbook, TheTube, etc.)
reduced_performance_description:
Performance Kum Ho Gayi
Zyada garmi ki wajah se throughput kam kar diya.
overheat_protection_description:
Overheat Bachao Chal Gaya
Zyada garmi ki wajah se throughput band kar diya.
virtualserverlimit_body:
Pyaare Grahak,

Hum aapke saath kaam karke khush hain.

Hamara focus small aur medium companies ke liye fast aur saste virtual servers dena hai. Isliye ab hum aapko aur servers nahi de sakte.

Aap apne purane servers use kar sakte ho, jab tak {cu} compute units se zyada nahi jate.

Shukriya
FastClouds CEO
required_potential_users_to_merge: Merge ke liye zaroori possible users
merging_description: Jab competitor ka 100% apna ho, uske users apni website mein transfer karo.
warning_not_enough_potential_users: Possible users bahut kam hain. Marketing chalao aur possible users badhao.
warning_not_owner: Is competitor ka 100% apna nahi hai. Aur stocks khareedo.
product_merged_description: Yeh website {productname} ke saath merge ho gayi aur ab exist nahi karti.
warning_no_investment_offers: Abhi tak koi investment offer nahi mila.
email_investment_offer_body: {productName} ke CEO Ko Hum {investorName} mein aapki progress dekh rahe hain. Hum bahut impressed hain! Hum aapko {productName} ka {percentage}% ke badle {amount} offer karna chahte hain. Humne offer aapke Venture Capital view mein bhej diya hai. Shukriya, {investorName}
click_to_buy_back: Wapas khareedne ke liye click karo
max_framework_level_reached: Framework ka max level aa gaya.
hosting_occupied: Saare resources pehle se doosri websites ke liye use ho rahe hain.
product_type_mismatch: Is website ka type competitor se alag hai, merge nahi ho sakta.
upgrade_framework_deny: Framework upgrade karne se pehle saare features ko max level tak pahunchao.
no_campaigns: Abhi tak koi campaign nahi banaya.
missing_insight: Is audience ke liye insight nahi hai.
filter_not_available: Yeh filter is marketing type ke liye nahi hai.
marketing_campaign_deny: Report ke liye kam se kam 10% audience chahiye.
feature_type_revenue_description: Yeh features website se paisa kamane mein help karte hain.
feature_type_users_description: Yeh features website ke possible users badhate hain.
label: Label
search_new_deal: Naya Deal Dhoondha Ja Raha Hai...
no_ad_spaces_warning: Is website mein koi ad space nahi. Text Ads, Banner Ads ya Video Ads feature jodo.
delete_ad_feature_confirm: Pakka yeh feature delete karna hai? Saare ad deals cancel ho jaayenge.
investor_message_milestone_1: Hello, Milne ki khushi hui! Mera naam Rosy hai aur main Devhives se aapki advisor hoon. Aapne website ke neeche milestones dekhe? Har milestone complete karne par turant payment milti hai. Pehle ek office lo. Hum recommend karte hain map ke upar left mein Small Building.
investor_message_milestone_4: Wah! Landing Page se log {productName} ke baare mein excited honge! Ab thodi si marketing chahiye. Website pe jaao aur Marketing Tab chuno. Wahan se Email Campaign banao aur registered users badhte dekho. Rozana budget badhane se mat daro.
investor_message_milestone_satisfaction: Badiya kaam! Aapka pehla asli feature! Features tab ke upar left mein smiley dekha? Yeh user satisfaction dikhata hai. Abhi bahut khush nahi kyunki feature bahut low level hai. Satisfaction zyada rakhna bahut zaroori hai. Kam hone par users website chhod denge. Feature ka level badhao satisfaction badhane ke liye. Modules ke liye Lead Developer chahiye.
investor_message_milestone_more_users: Bahut achha! Features upgrade karte waqt satisfaction ke liye levels balance rakhna yaad rakhna. Aur users chahiye! Email Campaigns chalate raho. Possible users registered users se zyada rakhna. Feature levels upgrade karke possible users badhao.
investor_message_milestone_8: Itne saare users! Log yahan {investorName} mein aapki success pe daav laga rahe hain! Ab servers ki baat karte hain. Jaise features add ya upgrade hote hain, zyada CU chahiye hoga. Pehle SysAdmin rakho. Phir website select karke Hosting Tab mein ek Mini Cloud Server jodo. Components ke liye SysAdmin se kaam lao.
investor_message_milestone_first_income: Chaliye. Server load pe nazar rakhna. 100% se upar jaane par users kho sakte hain. Ab income pe dhyan dena shuru karo. Pehle Text Ads feature research aur add karo. Phir Sales Executive rakho aur pehla ad contract negotiate karo.
investor_message_milestone_more_workstat: Badiya! Khayaal rakho income steady rahe aur deals ka jawab dete raho. Decorate lagti hai ki hamaare log ek doosre ke paas baithne lage hain? Developers ko yeh pasand nahi! Bada office lo. City Map pe jaao aur bada office lo.
investor_message_milestone_valuation: Badiya choice! Agle milestone ke liye website pe kaam karte raho. Features upgrade karo aur marketing campaigns chalao. Naye employees se mat daro. Apni current valuation website ke Stats tab mein dekh sakte ho. Ab targeted valuation tak pahuncho.
investor_message_milestone_more_users_2: Ek aur milestone! Marketing behtar karne ka waqt hai. Pehle marketer rakho. Phir pehla Text Ads campaign banao. Insight feature bhi dekho — 10% audience reach hone ke baad aur information milegi. Targeted registered users tak pahuncho.
investor_message_milestone_12: {productName} ki itni badi growth par badhaai! Frameworks ki baat karte hain. Abhi free framework use ho raha hai jo future mein kaam nahi aayega. Framework upgrade karne ke liye website ke Features Tab ke upar right mein Upgrade button click karo.
investor_message_milestone_13: Badiya choice! Naya framework zyada feature levels allow karta hai. Ab servers ki baat phir karte hain. Ab tak hum cloud servers use kar rahe the — basically kisi aur ke servers jo hum kirae pe le rahe the. Hum sochte hain {productName} ke liye khud ke servers insource karna achha idea hai. City Map pe jaao aur servers ke liye building lo.
investor_message_milestone_14: Apni nayi hosting facility mein swagat hai! Yahan aap mehange cloud servers ki jagah khud ke servers khareed aur setup kar sakte ho. Pehle ek rack khareed aur rakh do. Yahan servers lagenge. Rack pe click karo aur 1 web server, 1 database server aur 1 cache server install karo. Saare servers configure karne ke liye server click karo aur Configure button click karo. Target Produced CU tak pahuncho.
investor_message_milestone_15: Badiya! SysAdmins keh rahe hain naye servers optimally chal rahe hain. Agla milestone bada hai. Abhi har mahine paise ja rahe hain. Tables palto aur profit banao. Features badhao aur improve karo, marketing campaigns chalao aur hosting center expand karo. Aur Sales Executives rakho taaki ad schedule mein gap na rahe. Main aapko jab company achha paisa kamaye tab wapas aaoongi.
investor_message_milestone_more_users_3: Oh my god, badhaai ho! {productName} officially profit mein aa gayi! Marketing campaigns chalao, features upgrade karo aur aur servers install karo. Managers rakna mat bhoolo — isse aapki life aasaan hogi. Target registered users tak pahuncho.
investor_message_milestone_higher_cpm: Bahut tezi se aage badh rahe ho! Board sochta hai aap aur paisa kama sakte ho! Agar pehle se nahi kiya, toh Banner Ads ya Video Ads jaisa zyada paying revenue feature add karo. Satisfaction pe nazar rakhna, 50% se neeche mat jane do! Naye deals negotiate karo aur target website income tak pahuncho.
investor_message_milestone_16: Investors bahut excited hain! Aap officially successful ho! Jab celebrate ho jao, naye goal pe dhyan do: ek competitor acquire karo. Sirf paisa nahi, data center bhi scale karna hoga taaki naye users handle ho sakein. Paisa ikatha karo competitor afford karne ke liye.
investor_message_milestone_17: Developer ki taraf se message: Yeh is beta version ka aakhri advisor tip hai. Aage aur aayenge. Khud karte raho, bahut achha kar rahe ho! Jonas
reach_too_small: Bahut kam log tak pahunche. Targeting loose karo.

subscriptions_satisfaction_description: Subscription se users ka satisfaction kitna kam hoga.

offlinecontent_description: Users ko content save karke offline use karne do.

commentfunctionality_description: Comments section jodo jahan users baat kar sakein.
chatsystem_description: Users ko ek doosre se real-time mein chat karne do.
sellout_description: Apni website ka 50% se kam rakho

cannot_delete_feature_warning: Yeh feature delete nahi ho sakta kyunki active contracts hain.
level_tip2: Features upgrade karne se possible users aur satisfaction badhti hai par zyada CU chahiye.

{employeename} ({employeetype}) khush nahi hai aur naya kaam dhoondh raha hai.

Aapne Startup Company poori kar li!

Kul {days} din lage!

Khele Shukriya!

Dhyan do: Highscore ke baad bhi khel sakte ho par nayi content unlock nahi hogi.

adcontractended_label: Contract #{contractnumber} khatam hua aur time slot khaali ho gaya.

mergerinprogress_label: {competitorproductname} se {productname} mein users aa rahe hain
beginnerdevkit_description: Saare Developer beginner components unlock ho jaate hain.
intermediatedevkit_description: Saare Developer intermediate components unlock ho jaate hain.
expertdevkit_description: Saare Developer expert components unlock ho jaate hain.
not_unlocked: Abhi nahi milega. Unlock karne ke liye Research karo.
designerkit_description: Designers ke saare components unlock ho jaate hain.
beginnermarketingkit_description: Sabhi Prachar Ke Shuru Ke Ansh Kholta Hai.
intermediatemarketingkit_description: Sabhi Prachar Ke Madhyam Ansh Kholta Hai.
expertmarketingkit_description: Sabhi Prachar Ke Mahir Ansh Kholta Hai.
use_research_to_unlock_more: Research se aur unlock karo.
investor_message_milestone_researching: Pehle employees rakhe — badiya! Ab research karna hoga website shuru karne ke liye. Research Menu mein jaao aur yeh research karo: Beginner Devkit (Production), DesignerKit (Production) aur Landing Page (Features). Main aapko jab ho jao tab wapas aaoonga.
investor_message_milestone_3_v2: Ab aap research karna jaante ho. Research points sirf tab available hote hain jab aapke paas available points hon. Yeh Researchers generate karte hain, iske baare mein baad mein baat karenge. Ab website mein Landing Page add karne ka waqt hai. Website pe click karo aur Features Tab chuno. Khaali feature slot pe click karo aur Landing Page add karo. Ho jaane ke baad, Landing Page ko Level 1 pe upgrade karo taaki possible users badh sakein. Landing Page upgrade karne ke liye employees se required components banwaao.
investor_message_milestone_5_v2: Bahut Acha! Abhi Ke Liye Kaafi Hai. Aage Aap Marketing Ke Liye Zyaada Karmchari Rakh Sakenge. Ab Waapis Apni Website Par Jao Aur Aur Khasiyatein Jodein! Shodh Bindu Paane Ke Liye Ek Shodhkarta Rakhein. Jald Se Jald, Shodh Menu Pe Click Karke Khasiyat Tab Se Ek Aur Khasiyat Khojein. Nayi Khasiyat Khulne Ke Baad, Ise Website Pe Khasiyat Tab Se Jodein. Intezaar Ke Waqt, Karmchariyon Ki Maangein Aankde Tab Pe Check Karein.
beginnersysadminkit_description: Sabhi SysAdmin Ke Shuru Ke Ansh Kholta Hai.
serverpack1_description: Chote Websites Ke Liye Aadhar Servers Ka Set.
serverpack2_description: Mission-Critical Servers. Badi Websites Ke Liye Jo 10 Lakh Se Zyaada Upyogkarta Hain.
serverpack3_description: High Intensity Servers. Sirf Bahut Zyaada Traffic Wali Websites Ke Liye.
serverpack4_description: XServers Ka Pack: Sabse Taaqatwar Rack Servers Jo Kabhi Bane.
beginnerleaddevkit_description: Sabhi Lead Developer Ke Shuru Ke Modules Kholta Hai.
intermediateleaddevkit_description: Sabhi Lead Developer Ke Madhyam Modules Kholta Hai.
